# AEO Pilot

> AEO Pilot is the growth platform for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO). It helps
> startups, SaaS companies, agencies and brands become discoverable, mentioned,
> ranked, and cited inside AI answer engines — ChatGPT, GPT Search, Gemini,
> Claude, Perplexity, Copilot, Grok and DeepSeek — rather than only ranking on
> Google's blue links.

## What AEO Pilot does (the logic of use)

1. You enter a domain.
2. AEO Pilot crawls the site and extracts on-page signals (schema, FAQ, headings,
   metadata, internal links, knowledge pages).
3. It computes an AEO score across 8 categories: Technical AEO, Entity Strength,
   Topical Authority, Schema Coverage, Answerability, AI Readability, Citation
   Readiness, and Knowledge Coverage (0–100 each, weighted into an overall score).
4. The AI Monitoring Agent prompts each answer engine with real buyer questions and
   measures whether the brand is mentioned, at what rank, and whether it is cited —
   producing measured per-engine visibility and Share of AI Voice.
5. It returns prioritized, impact-ranked recommendations, and can generate the
   fixes (schema, FAQ corpora, entity graph, knowledge hub) or have its experts
   implement them via a Done-For-You service.

## Key facts

- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) = optimizing so AI assistants cite your brand
  in their single generated answer. It is the successor discipline to SEO for the
  era of AI search.
- AEO Pilot scores 8 categories and tracks 8+ answer engines.
- Pricing (INR, billed via Razorpay): Starter (Free), Growth (₹3,999/mo),
  Agency (₹15,999/mo), Enterprise (custom).
- The platform runs with zero API keys (heuristic scoring); adding an LLM key
  unlocks live monitoring and AI-written content.

- [Home](/): product overview and AI visibility dashboard.
- [What is AEO](/learn): definition of Answer Engine Optimization and how AEO Pilot works.
- [AEO Guides](/guides): playbooks to get cited by AI answer engines.
- [AEO vs SEO](/comparisons): how optimizing for answers differs from optimizing for links.
- [AEO Glossary](/glossary): the vocabulary of Answer Engine Optimization.
- [Use Cases](/use-cases): how different teams use AEO Pilot.
- [FAQ](/faq): common questions about AEO and AEO Pilot.
